scripts.build: npm run build -w @pulse/contracts && npm run build -w @pulse/api && npm run build -w @pulse/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @pulse/contracts && npm run typecheck -w @pulse/api && npm run typecheck -w @pulse/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @pulse/contracts && npm run test -w @pulse/api && npm run test -w @pulse/web
scripts.dev:api: npm run build -w @pulse/contracts && npm run dev -w @pulse/api
scripts.dev:web: npm run build -w @pulse/contracts && npm run dev -w @pulse/web
